title: Never set max_attempts: 1 for a real worker
prompt: The worker in `test_fixtures/sleep_retry_worker.ex` sets `max_attempts: 1` (defeating Oban's retry semantics) and reinvents retries with `Process.sleep`. Rewrite it so max_attempts is 5, the Process.sleep loop is removed, and perform/1 returns `{:error, reason}` on transient failures so Oban can retry via its own backoff. Keep the module name and queue. Write to `lib/my_app/workers/sync_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: Single-file refactor: delete the sleep loop, return an error tuple, raise max_attempts. Standard Oban refactor.
research_citation: Oban error_handling HexDocs — 'By default, jobs are retried up to 20 times. The retry delay has an exponential backoff with jitter.'
